docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ACUPERA INC.
TRIAL RESET TO FEB-05-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF DEC-18-2014 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF REMARKS: THIS SERVICE UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE DEFENDANT NOT FOUND. - FEE FOR SERVICE $35.00 - SERVED DEC-11-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ACUPERA INC.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ACUPERA INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-05-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JACOBY, KIM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ACUPERA INC. $9,560.00 PRINCIPAL, $195.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,755.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,560.00 FILED BY JACOBY, KIM AS TO DEFENDANT ACUPERA INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-18-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $85.00 - SERVED DEC-22-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ACUPERA INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-05-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-05-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY RONALD RAZMI--CEO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
